author: Pawan Rahate
name: AI Copilot Workspace Scaffold
description: Production-ready scaffold for Copilot workspace layers. Creates .copilot-chat, .github, and .vscode directories with rich template content. Works with .NET, Angular, or any project type.

choices.description: Full-stack scaffolding — all Copilot layers, agents, instructions, prompts, and VS Code config
.NET backend scaffolding — backend agents, instructions, prompts, and VS Code config
Angular frontend scaffolding — frontend agents, instructions, prompts, and VS Code config

projectType.description: The type of project to scaffold for. Determines which agents, instructions, and prompts are included.

projectName.description: The project name used throughout generated files (e.g., solution name, namespace prefix, UI title).

angularVersion.description: Angular major version for frontend code patterns and documentation.

dotnetVersion.description: .NET major version for backend code patterns and documentation.

csharpVersion.description: C# language version for coding standards.

dbProvider.description: Database provider for the persistence layer.

postActions.description: AI Copilot scaffold created successfully! Open the .copilot-chat/04-workflow-layer/QUICK_START.md to get started.

manualInstructions.text: Open .copilot-chat/04-workflow-layer/QUICK_START.md to get started with your AI Copilot workspace.
